category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a Linux library for POSIX capabilities.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the maintainer page; source_facts.repo provides the official GitHub README fallback.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/stevegrubb/libcap-ng, so repo enrichment was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies POSIX capabilities; source_facts.executables lists filecap, netcap, and pscap.
